001 — About

The Story So Far.

Bio

Who I Am

I'm Avisha Catharin, a 2nd-year B.Tech IT student at SRM University, Chennai. I build software that actually does something — a published Chrome extension, an offline disaster alert system, an exam platform, a pathfinding visualizer. Completed an AICTE-certified Python internship at VaultofCodes (Google for Education Partner), competed at DevTrails 2026 and iTRIX, and I'm always learning, always shipping.
